DEFENDANT DANA COMPANIES, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Dana Companies, LLC's motion for summary adjudication of plaintiffs' claim for punitive damages is denied. Defendant sustained its initial burden. Plaintiffs' Exhibits J through S create a triable issue whether defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant the imposition of punitive damages. (Plaintiffs' separate statement of disputed material facts, nos. 2-14.) Defendant's objections nos. 1 through 8 are sustained.
